home.comingSoonBody: This site is being prepared. Check back shortly.

book.noRooms: No rooms are set up yet. Please contact the property directly.
book.holdNotice: We are holding this room for you for 15 minutes while you complete your details.
book.holdGoneBody: Holds last 15 minutes. Your dates may still be available, please search again.
book.doneConfirmedBody: Your deposit was received and your reservation is confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way.
book.doneProcessingBody: We are waiting for your payment to be confirmed. This usually takes under a minute; check your email for the confirmation.
book.donePayIssueBody: Your reservation is saved, but the payment step could not start. The property will contact you to arrange the deposit, or you can reach them directly.
book.doneRequestBody: The property will review your request and confirm by email.
book.keepCode: Keep this code. It is how you and the property refer to your reservation.
book.notFoundBody: Check the link in your confirmation email, or contact the property.

errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_DATE: Those dates do not look right. Please pick them again.
errors.STAY_TOO_LONG: That stay is longer than we can book online. Contact the property directly.
errors.NO_AVAILABILITY: That room type just sold out for these dates. Another room may still be free.
errors.HOLD_NOT_FOUND: Your hold expired. Please search again.
errors.INVALID_GUEST: Please give us your name and a valid email address.
errors.PAYMENT_NOT_CONFIGURED: Online payment is not available yet for this property.
errors.PROVIDER_ERROR: The payment service had a problem. Your reservation is saved; please try paying again shortly.

landing.headline: Hotel websites that take bookings themselves
landing.subhead: A complete website for your property: real-time room booking with mobile money and cards, events, a vetted local concierge, and guest messaging. You manage everything from your phone; we handle the rest.

features.title: Bookings with deposits
features.body: Guests confirm a room in cedis by MTN MoMo, Telecel Cash, AirtelTigo Money, or card. Card-country properties can run Stripe instead.

features.title: Run it yourself
features.body: Rooms, prices, photos, menus, events, and your local guide, all editable by your team in minutes. No developer needed.

features.title: A concierge your guests trust
features.body: Drivers, guides, and nightlife contacts you vet, one WhatsApp tap away. Partners apply on the site and keep their own profiles current.

features.title: Reach your guests
features.body: Send updates to current, upcoming, or past guests: an event with a reserve button, or simply that the water is back on.

features.title: Your brand, your domain
features.body: Your logo, your colors, your web address. Confirmation emails come from your property's name.

features.title: Built for real connectivity
features.body: Mobile-first and fast on 3G, with guest essentials that stay readable offline.

landing.statusBody: Stay.WitUS is onboarding its first properties now. Interested in yours? Reach out through witus.online.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.intro: What we are building for properties on Stay.WitUS, in the order we are building it. Dates are targets we work toward, not promises.

items.title: Real-time booking with deposits
items.body: Live room availability, short holds while a guest checks out, and deposits in cedis by MTN MoMo, Telecel Cash, AirtelTigo Money, or card. The reservation engine is built so a double-booking is impossible, even under simultaneous requests.

items.title: Your website, run by your team
items.body: Rooms, prices, photos, events, and your local guide, editable without a developer. Your logo, your colors, your domain: section order and layout are yours to arrange.

items.title: Vetted concierge partners
items.body: Drivers, guides, and nightlife contacts apply on your site. You approve who appears; guests reach them directly on WhatsApp.

items.title: Guest announcements
items.body: Send updates to current, upcoming, or past guests: an event with a reserve button, or simply that the water is back on.

items.title: Guest community hub
items.body: A private space for your guests: area tips, house updates, and event RSVPs, inspired by the WhatsApp groups great hosts already run.

items.title: Partner ratings
items.body: Guests rate concierge partners after a stay, so your roster keeps earning its place.

items.title: Calendar sync with Airbnb and Booking.com
items.body: Two-way iCal so your direct site and the big platforms never sell the same night twice.

items.title: Paid event ticketing and Spanish
items.body: Sell tickets to hotel events, and serve guests in Spanish with human-translated pages.

items.title: Charge to room
items.body: Guests add drinks and extras to their stay and settle once, by cash, MoMo, or card.

items.title: Channel manager and WhatsApp Business
items.body: Deeper distribution and guest messaging where your guests already are.

items.title: Multi-property owners
items.body: Run a second property from the same account, with its own brand and domain.

roadmap.outro: Something your property needs that is not here? Tell us through witus.online.

setup.title: No site is configured for this address
setup.body: This host is not mapped to a property yet. If you are the site owner, add the domain from your admin dashboard.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.body: We will email you a one-time link to sign in to
signIn.sent: Check your email. If that address has access, a sign-in link is on its way. It expires in 10 minutes.
signIn.invalid: That does not look like an email address. Please check it and try again.
signIn.unavailable: Sign-in is not available right now. Please try again later.
